name: Step 2: Update the Position and Correction Alphas using the Position/Correction curve set for each Mantle.
title: Step 2: Update the Position and Correction Alphas using the Position/Correction curve set for each Mantle.
terms: Step 2: Update the Position and Correction Alphas using the Position/Correction curve set for each Mantle.

name: Step 3: Lerp multiple transforms together for independent control over the horizontal and vertical blend to the animated start position, as well as the target position.
title: Step 3: Lerp multiple transforms together for independent control over the horizontal and vertical blend to the animated start position, as well as the target position.

name: Initial Blend In (controlled in the timeline curve) to allow the actor to blend into the Position/Correction curve at the midoint. This prevents pops when mantling an object lower than the animated mantle.
title: Initial Blend In (controlled in the timeline curve) to allow the actor to blend into the Position/Correction curve at the midoint. This prevents pops when mantling an object lower than the animated mantle.

name: Blend from the currently blending transforms into the final mantle target using the X value of the Position/Correction Curve.
title: Blend from the currently blending transforms into the final mantle target using the X value of the Position/Correction Curve.
terms: Blend from the currently blending transforms into the final mantle target using the X value of the Position/Correction Curve.

name: Blend into the animated horizontal and rotation offset using the Y value of the Position/Correction Curve.
title: Blend into the animated horizontal and rotation offset using the Y value of the Position/Correction Curve.
terms: Blend into the animated horizontal and rotation offset using the Y value of the Position/Correction Curve.

name: Blend into the animated vertical offset using the Z value of the Position/Correction Curve.
title: Blend into the animated vertical offset using the Z value of the Position/Correction Curve.
terms: Blend into the animated vertical offset using the Z value of the Position/Correction Curve.
